reasoning: The armor uses a bright saturated mid-green chest plate paired with warm rust-orange leather drapes — a near-complementary split that reads as vibrant and warm, aligning well with the Echoes sunset-orange and saturated-green targets. The parchment-white chest accent is broadly compatible with palette neutrals. Color temperature overall is warm-dominant; no muddy desaturation, no cold corporate greys in the mid-tones. Main concerns: (1) pixel-art outline strokes appear to be very dark brown or pure black — the rightmost panel on the light background exposes near-black pixels that border the shadow-quality rule; if they are #0e0e0e or similar rather than a warm dark-brown/plum, that is a minor violation. (2) The white highlight on the chest is slightly neutral-cool rather than a warm cream, creating a subtle cold spot. Neither issue significantly damages the overall warm-bright read, but together they prevent a clean pass. Palette compatibility is solid: green and orange both map to reference swatches in rows 1-2; no neon or goth tones detected.
